description: Well-rounded nutrition plan with balanced macros from whole foods for sustainable healthy eating

bal_overnight_oats.name: Berry Overnight Oats
bal_overnight_oats.description: Creamy overnight oats layered with mixed berries and a drizzle of honey
instructions: Combine oats, milk, Greek yogurt, and chia seeds in a mason jar or container.
Stir well, cover, and refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours.
In the morning, top with mixed berries, sliced almonds, and a drizzle of honey.
Stir gently and enjoy cold or at room temperature.

bal_veggie_scramble.name: Garden Veggie Egg Scramble
bal_veggie_scramble.description: Fluffy scrambled eggs loaded with bell peppers, spinach, and feta on whole wheat toast
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Saute diced bell peppers for 2 minutes until slightly softened.
Add spinach and cook for 1 minute until wilted.
Pour in beaten eggs, gently fold until just set, about 2-3 minutes.
Top with crumbled feta and serve alongside toasted whole wheat bread.

bal_banana_pancakes.name: Whole Wheat Banana Pancakes
bal_banana_pancakes.description: Light and fluffy whole wheat pancakes with caramelized banana slices and a touch of maple syrup
instructions: Mash half the banana into a bowl, slice the other half and set aside.
Whisk together flour, baking powder, and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
Combine mashed banana, egg, and milk, then fold into dry ingredients until just combined.
Melt butter on a griddle over medium heat and pour batter to form 3 pancakes.
Cook 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown.
Top with sliced banana and drizzle with maple syrup.

bal_greek_yogurt_bowl.name: Greek Yogurt Power Bowl
bal_greek_yogurt_bowl.description: Thick Greek yogurt topped with granola, walnuts, and fresh fruit
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
Arrange granola, walnuts, banana slices, and blueberries on top.
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

bal_avocado_toast_egg.name: Avocado Toast with Poached Egg
bal_avocado_toast_egg.description: Crispy whole grain toast topped with mashed avocado, a perfectly poached egg, and everything seasoning
instructions: Toast the whole grain bread until golden and crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and spread evenly on both slices.
Bring a small pot of water to a gentle simmer, add vinegar, and create a swirl.
Crack egg into the center, poach for 3-4 minutes, then remove with a slotted spoon.
Place poached egg on top of avocado toast, sprinkle with everything seasoning and red pepper flakes.

bal_smoothie_bowl.name: Tropical Smoothie Bowl
bal_smoothie_bowl.description: Thick blended mango-banana smoothie bowl topped with coconut flakes and seeds
instructions: Blend mango, frozen banana, Greek yogurt, and coconut milk until thick and smooth.
Pour into a bowl — the consistency should be thicker than a drinkable smoothie.
Arrange coconut flakes, pumpkin seeds, hemp seeds, and sliced strawberries on top.
Serve immediately before it melts.

bal_oatmeal_apple.name: Cinnamon Apple Oatmeal
bal_oatmeal_apple.description: Warm steel-cut oatmeal with sauteed cinnamon apples and a dollop of almond butter
instructions: Cook steel-cut oats in water with a pinch of salt according to package directions.
In a small pan, melt butter over medium heat and saute diced apple with cinnamon for 3-4 minutes.
Transfer oatmeal to a bowl and top with sauteed apples.
Add a dollop of almond butter and drizzle with maple syrup.

bal_breakfast_wrap.name: Turkey Sausage Breakfast Wrap
bal_breakfast_wrap.description: Whole wheat tortilla filled with turkey sausage, scrambled egg whites, and pepper jack cheese
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and cook sliced turkey sausage until browned, about 4 minutes.
Push sausage to the side, pour in egg whites, and scramble until just set.
Warm the tortilla in the microwave for 15 seconds.
Layer sausage, scrambled egg whites, and shredded cheese down the center of the tortilla.
Top with salsa verde, fold in the sides, and roll tightly into a wrap.

bal_cottage_cheese_toast.name: Whipped Cottage Cheese Toast
bal_cottage_cheese_toast.description: Sourdough toast with whipped cottage cheese, sliced peaches, and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt
ingredients: 1 medium peach, sliced (or canned in juice)
instructions: Blend cottage cheese in a food processor or blender until smooth and whipped.
Toast sourdough slices until golden.
Spread whipped cottage cheese generously on each slice.
Arrange peach slices on top, drizzle with honey, and finish with flaky sea salt.

bal_shakshuka.name: Shakshuka with Crusty Bread
bal_shakshuka.description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato and bell pepper sauce, served with warm crusty bread
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, saute onion and bell pepper for 4 minutes.
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika, stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in crushed tomatoes, stir, and simmer for 8-10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Make two wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each.
Cover and cook on low for 5-7 minutes until egg whites are set but yolks are still runny.
Garnish with parsley and serve with warm crusty bread for dipping.

bal_frittata.name: Mushroom and Herb Frittata
bal_frittata.description: Light and fluffy oven-baked frittata with cremini mushrooms, fresh herbs, and Gruyere cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat and saute mushrooms for 5 minutes.
Pour egg mixture over mushrooms and sprinkle with cheese and herbs.
Cook on stovetop for 2 minutes until edges begin to set.
Transfer to oven and bake 10-12 minutes until puffed and golden.
Let rest 2 minutes, then slice into wedges. Serves 2 — one serving is half.

bal_chia_pudding.name: Chocolate Chia Seed Pudding
bal_chia_pudding.description: Rich chocolate chia pudding made with cocoa powder and topped with raspberries and almonds
instructions: Whisk together almond milk, cocoa powder, maple syrup, and vanilla extract until smooth.
Stir in chia seeds thoroughly to prevent clumping.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight, stirring once after 30 minutes.
Serve topped with fresh raspberries and sliced almonds.

bal_chicken_grain_bowl.name: Grilled Chicken Quinoa Power Bowl
bal_chicken_grain_bowl.description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken over fluffy quinoa with roasted sweet potato and tahini drizzle
ingredients: 5 oz chicken breast, grilled and sliced
1/2 medium sweet potato, cubed and roasted
Salt, pepper, garlic powder to taste
instructions: Season chicken breast with garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Grill 5-6 minutes per side until cooked through.
Toss sweet potato cubes in olive oil and roast at 400F for 20 minutes.
Cook quinoa according to package directions and fluff with a fork.
Assemble bowl with quinoa base, kale, sliced chicken, roasted sweet potato, and avocado.
Whisk tahini with lemon juice and 1 tbsp water, drizzle over the bowl.

bal_turkey_sandwich.name: Turkey Cranberry Club Sandwich
bal_turkey_sandwich.description: Stacked whole grain sandwich with roasted turkey, cranberry spread, arugula, and Swiss cheese
instructions: Toast whole grain bread until lightly golden.
Spread cranberry sauce on one slice and Dijon mustard on the other.
Layer turkey breast, Swiss cheese, cucumber slices, and arugula.
Press together, slice diagonally, and serve.

bal_salmon_salad.name: Citrus Salmon Salad
bal_salmon_salad.description: Flaked pan-seared salmon over mixed greens with orange segments, pecans, and citrus vinaigrette
instructions: Season salmon with salt and pepper. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat with half the olive oil.
Cook salmon skin-side up for 4 minutes, flip and cook 3-4 more minutes until done. Let cool slightly and flake.
Arrange mixed greens on a plate and top with orange segments, red onion, pecans, and cranberries.
Whisk remaining olive oil, orange juice, and balsamic vinegar for the dressing.
Add flaked salmon on top and drizzle with citrus vinaigrette.

bal_lentil_soup.name: Hearty Red Lentil Soup
bal_lentil_soup.description: Warming red lentil soup with carrots, celery, and cumin served with a slice of crusty bread
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Saute onion, carrot, and celery for 5 minutes.
Add garlic, cumin, and turmeric, stirring for 30 seconds.
Add lentils and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer.
Cook for 20-25 minutes until lentils are very soft and soup has thickened.
Stir in a squeeze of lemon juice. Serve with crusty whole wheat bread.

bal_chicken_caesar_wrap.name: Grilled Chicken Caesar Wrap
bal_chicken_caesar_wrap.description: Whole wheat wrap with grilled chicken, crisp romaine, Parmesan, and a light Caesar dressing
instructions: Grill chicken breast seasoned with salt and pepper for 5-6 minutes per side. Let rest and slice.
Warm the tortilla briefly in a dry skillet or microwave.
Toss romaine with Caesar dressing and Parmesan in a bowl.
Layer dressed romaine, sliced chicken, and cherry tomatoes down the center of the tortilla.
Fold in the sides and roll tightly. Slice in half on a diagonal.

bal_tuna_poke_bowl.name: Ahi Tuna Poke Bowl
bal_tuna_poke_bowl.description: Sushi-grade ahi tuna over seasoned rice with edamame, cucumber, avocado, and soy-sesame glaze
instructions: Cook brown rice according to package directions. Season with rice vinegar and let cool slightly.
Toss cubed ahi tuna with soy sauce and sesame oil. Let marinate 5 minutes.
Arrange rice in a bowl and top with marinated tuna, edamame, cucumber, and avocado.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve with pickled ginger on the side.

bal_mediterranean_plate.name: Mediterranean Mezze Plate
bal_mediterranean_plate.description: A colorful spread of hummus, falafel, tabbouleh, and warm pita with fresh vegetables
instructions: Bake or pan-fry falafel patties according to package directions until crispy.
Prepare tabbouleh by combining cooked bulgur with chopped parsley, diced tomato, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Warm pita bread in the oven or toaster.
Arrange hummus, falafel, tabbouleh, cucumbers, tomatoes, and pickled turnip on a plate.
Drizzle olive oil over hummus and serve with warm pita wedges.

bal_black_bean_bowl.name: Southwest Black Bean Bowl
bal_black_bean_bowl.description: Seasoned black beans with cilantro-lime rice, corn salsa, and a dollop of Greek yogurt
ingredients: 3/4 cup canned black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan, add black beans, cumin, and chili powder. Cook 5 minutes until warmed through.
Mix cooked brown rice with half the lime juice and cilantro.
Combine corn, diced tomato, and red onion for a quick salsa.
Assemble bowl with cilantro-lime rice, seasoned black beans, and corn salsa.
Top with Greek yogurt and remaining lime juice.

bal_shrimp_stir_fry.name: Garlic Shrimp Stir-Fry
bal_shrimp_stir_fry.description: Juicy garlic shrimp tossed with snap peas, carrots, and brown rice in a light ginger-soy sauce
ingredients: 5 oz large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add shrimp and cook 2 minutes per side until pink. Remove and set aside.
Stir-fry snap peas and carrots for 2-3 minutes until crisp-tender.
Add garlic and ginger, cook 30 seconds. Return shrimp to the wok.
Pour in soy sauce, rice vinegar, and cornstarch slurry. Toss until sauce thickens.
Serve immediately over brown rice.

bal_turkey_stuffed_pepper.name: Turkey-Stuffed Bell Peppers
bal_turkey_stuffed_pepper.description: Colorful bell peppers stuffed with lean ground turkey, brown rice, tomatoes, and melted mozzarella
ingredients: 2 medium bell peppers, halved and seeded
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F. Place halved bell peppers in a baking dish.
Brown ground turkey in a skillet with olive oil, breaking apart. Season with oregano, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Stir in cooked brown rice and diced tomatoes. Cook 2 minutes.
Divide filling among pepper halves and top with shredded mozzarella.
Cover with foil and bake 25 minutes, then uncover and bake 10 more minutes until cheese is bubbly.
Serve 2 halves per portion.

bal_asian_noodle_salad.name: Sesame Peanut Noodle Salad
bal_asian_noodle_salad.description: Chilled soba noodles tossed with shredded chicken, crunchy vegetables, and a creamy peanut-sesame dressing
instructions: Cook soba noodles according to package directions, rinse under cold water, and drain.
Whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and honey until smooth.
Toss cold noodles with the dressing until evenly coated.
Add shredded chicken, red cabbage, carrot, and green onions. Toss gently.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve chilled or at room temperature.

bal_caprese_panini.name: Caprese Panini with Pesto
bal_caprese_panini.description: Pressed whole grain sandwich with fresh mozzarella, ripe tomato, basil, and homemade pesto
instructions: Spread pesto on one slice of whole grain bread.
Layer mozzarella slices, tomato slices, and fresh basil leaves.
Drizzle with balsamic glaze and top with the second slice of bread.
Brush outside of bread lightly with olive oil.
Press in a panini press or grill pan with a heavy pan on top for 3-4 minutes per side until golden and cheese melts.

bal_chicken_tortilla_soup.name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
bal_chicken_tortilla_soup.description: Smoky tomato-based soup with shredded chicken, black beans, and crispy tortilla strips
ingredients: 1 small corn tortilla, cut into strips
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot and saute onion for 3 minutes. Add garlic, cumin, and chili powder.
Add tomatoes and chicken broth, bring to a simmer.
Add chicken breast whole. Simmer 15 minutes until cooked through.
Remove chicken, shred with two forks, and return to pot. Add black beans and cook 5 more minutes.
Meanwhile, bake tortilla strips at 375F for 8 minutes until crispy.
Ladle soup into a bowl, top with tortilla strips, cilantro, and a dollop of Greek yogurt.

bal_baked_salmon_dinner.name: Herb-Crusted Baked Salmon
bal_baked_salmon_dinner.description: Dijon and herb-crusted salmon fillet with roasted asparagus and wild rice pilaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Brush salmon with Dijon mustard. Mix panko with dill and parsley, press onto the top of the salmon.
Toss asparagus with half the olive oil, salt, and pepper. Arrange alongside salmon on the baking sheet.
Bake for 15-18 minutes until salmon flakes easily and asparagus is tender.
Serve salmon and asparagus over wild rice pilaf with a lemon wedge.

bal_beef_stir_fry.name: Beef and Broccoli Stir-Fry
bal_beef_stir_fry.description: Tender sliced sirloin with broccoli florets in a savory garlic-ginger sauce over steamed jasmine rice
ingredients: 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat. Sear beef slices for 2 minutes until browned. Remove and set aside.
Add broccoli and 2 tbsp water to the wok. Cover and steam 3 minutes until bright green and crisp-tender.
Add garlic and ginger, stir 30 seconds. Return beef to the wok.
Pour in soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and cornstarch slurry. Toss until sauce coats everything.
Serve immediately over steamed jasmine rice.

bal_grilled_chicken_dinner.name: Lemon Herb Grilled Chicken
bal_grilled_chicken_dinner.description: Juicy grilled chicken thigh with garlic-roasted baby potatoes and steamed green beans
instructions: Marinate chicken thigh in lemon juice, half the olive oil, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper for 10 minutes.
Toss halved baby potatoes with remaining olive oil and garlic. Roast at 400F for 25 minutes until golden.
Grill or pan-sear chicken thigh for 5-6 minutes per side until internal temp reaches 165F.
Steam green beans for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Let chicken rest 5 minutes before slicing. Serve alongside roasted potatoes and green beans.

bal_pasta_primavera.name: Whole Wheat Pasta Primavera
bal_pasta_primavera.description: Al dente whole wheat penne tossed with seasonal vegetables in a light garlic-olive oil sauce with Parmesan
instructions: Cook penne in salted boiling water until al dente. Reserve 1/4 cup pasta water before draining.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Saute zucchini and yellow squash for 3 minutes.
Add cherry tomatoes, peas, and garlic. Cook 2-3 minutes until tomatoes soften.
Add drained pasta and a splash of pasta water. Toss until everything is coated.
Top with grated Parmesan, fresh basil, and red pepper flakes.

bal_fish_tacos.name: Blackened Fish Tacos
bal_fish_tacos.description: Crispy blackened cod in warm corn tortillas with mango slaw and chipotle lime crema
instructions: Mix smoked paprika, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and pepper. Coat cod fillet with the spice rub.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook cod 3-4 minutes per side until blackened and flaky.
Toss shredded cabbage and mango with half the lime juice for the slaw.
Mix Greek yogurt with chipotle and remaining lime juice for the crema.
Warm corn tortillas, fill with flaked cod, top with mango slaw and chipotle lime crema.

bal_tofu_curry.name: Coconut Tofu Curry
bal_tofu_curry.description: Golden coconut curry with crispy tofu, chickpeas, and spinach served over basmati rice
ingredients: 5 oz extra-firm tofu, cubed and pressed
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a skillet and fry tofu cubes until golden on all sides, about 6 minutes. Set aside.
In the same pan, saute onion for 3 minutes. Stir in curry paste for 30 seconds.
Add diced tomatoes and coconut milk. Simmer 10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Add chickpeas and spinach, cook 3 minutes until spinach wilts.
Return tofu to the curry and gently fold in.
Serve over basmati rice, garnished with fresh cilantro.

bal_pork_tenderloin.name: Maple-Glazed Pork Tenderloin
bal_pork_tenderloin.description: Juicy roasted pork tenderloin with a maple-Dijon glaze, roasted Brussels sprouts, and mashed sweet potato
ingredients: 1 medium sweet potato, peeled and cubed
Salt, pepper, garlic powder to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Season pork with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Mix maple syrup and Dijon mustard. Brush half the glaze over the pork.
Toss Brussels sprouts with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Arrange around pork on a baking sheet.
Roast for 20-25 minutes, brushing remaining glaze on pork halfway through. Internal temp should reach 145F.
Meanwhile, boil sweet potato cubes until tender, drain, and mash with butter and a pinch of salt.
Let pork rest 5 minutes, slice, and serve with Brussels sprouts and mashed sweet potato.

bal_chicken_stir_fry_thai.name: Thai Basil Chicken
bal_chicken_stir_fry_thai.description: Fragrant Thai basil chicken with bell peppers and onions over steamed jasmine rice
ingredients: 1 Thai chili or 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add garlic and chili, stir for 15 seconds.
Add chicken and stir-fry 4-5 minutes until cooked through and lightly browned.
Add bell pepper and onion, cook 2-3 minutes until slightly softened.
Stir in fish sauce, oyster sauce, and brown sugar. Toss to coat.
Remove from heat, fold in Thai basil leaves until just wilted.
Serve immediately over steamed jasmine rice.

bal_sheet_pan_sausage.name: Sheet Pan Sausage and Vegetables
bal_sheet_pan_sausage.description: Roasted chicken sausage with colorful bell peppers, red onion, and fingerling potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 425F. Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss sliced sausage, bell peppers, onion, and potatoes with olive oil, Italian seasoning, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Spread in a single layer on the baking sheet, ensuring nothing overlaps.
Roast for 25-30 minutes, tossing halfway through, until potatoes are golden and vegetables are caramelized.
Serve directly from the sheet pan.

bal_miso_glazed_cod.name: Miso-Glazed Cod with Bok Choy
bal_miso_glazed_cod.description: Sweet white miso-glazed cod fillet with sauteed baby bok choy and steamed brown rice
instructions: Preheat oven broiler to high. Mix miso paste, mirin, and honey into a smooth glaze.
Pat cod dry and place on a foil-lined baking sheet. Brush generously with miso glaze.
Broil for 8-10 minutes until the top is caramelized and fish flakes easily.
Meanwhile, heat sesame oil in a pan and saute bok choy cut-side down for 3 minutes, then flip and cook 2 more.
Serve cod over brown rice alongside bok choy. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onion.

bal_stuffed_sweet_potato.name: Loaded Stuffed Sweet Potato
bal_stuffed_sweet_potato.description: Baked sweet potato stuffed with seasoned ground turkey, black beans, cheese, and fresh salsa
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Pierce sweet potato with a fork and bake 40-45 minutes until tender.
While potato bakes, heat olive oil in a skillet and brown ground turkey with cumin and chili powder.
Add black beans to the turkey and warm through for 2 minutes.
Split the sweet potato open, fluff the inside with a fork.
Fill with turkey-bean mixture, top with cheddar, pico de gallo, and Greek yogurt.

bal_mediterranean_salmon.name: Mediterranean Baked Salmon
bal_mediterranean_salmon.description: Oven-baked salmon with cherry tomatoes, Kalamata olives, capers, and orzo pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F. Place salmon on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Arrange cherry tomatoes, olives, and capers around the salmon. Drizzle everything with olive oil and season with oregano, salt, and pepper.
Bake 15-18 minutes until salmon flakes easily with a fork.
Cook orzo according to package directions and toss with a squeeze of lemon and parsley.
Serve salmon over orzo, spooning the roasted tomato-olive mixture on top.

bal_veggie_chili.name: Three-Bean Vegetable Chili
bal_veggie_chili.description: Hearty vegetarian chili with kidney beans, black beans, and pintos in a smoky tomato broth
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat. Saute onion and carrot for 4 minutes.
Add garlic, chili powder, cumin, and smoked paprika. Stir 30 seconds.
Add crushed tomatoes, vegetable broth, all three beans, and zucchini.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 20-25 minutes until thickened.
Ladle into a bowl and top with shredded cheddar.

bal_teriyaki_chicken.name: Teriyaki Chicken with Steamed Vegetables
bal_teriyaki_chicken.description: Glossy teriyaki-glazed chicken thigh over fluffy rice with steamed broccoli and carrots
ingredients: 1 tsp cornstarch mixed with 1 tbsp water
instructions: Mix soy sauce, mirin, and honey for the teriyaki sauce.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken thigh 5-6 minutes per side until golden and cooked through.
Pour teriyaki sauce over chicken, add cornstarch slurry, and simmer until sauce thickens and glazes the chicken.
Steam broccoli and carrots for 4-5 minutes until tender-crisp.
Slice chicken, serve over rice alongside steamed vegetables. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.

bal_greek_salad_chicken.name: Greek Salad with Grilled Chicken
bal_greek_salad_chicken.description: Classic Greek salad with juicy grilled chicken, feta, olives, and oregano vinaigrette with warm pita
instructions: Season and grill chicken breast 5-6 minutes per side. Let rest and slice.
Arrange romaine lettuce on a plate and top with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, red onion, and feta.
Whisk olive oil, red wine vinegar, and oregano for the dressing.
Place sliced grilled chicken on top of the salad.
Drizzle with dressing and serve with warm pita wedge.

bal_trail_mix.name: Homemade Trail Mix
bal_trail_mix.description: Crunchy mix of almonds, walnuts, pumpkin seeds, dark chocolate chips, and dried apricots
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl or container.
Toss gently to mix evenly.
Store in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks. Portion into snack bags for grab-and-go.

bal_apple_peanut_butter.name: Apple Slices with Peanut Butter
bal_apple_peanut_butter.description: Crisp apple slices paired with creamy natural peanut butter and a sprinkle of granola
instructions: Core and slice the apple into 8-10 wedges.
Arrange on a plate with peanut butter in a small bowl for dipping.
Sprinkle granola over the peanut butter for added crunch.

bal_hummus_veggie_plate.name: Hummus and Veggie Dippers
bal_hummus_veggie_plate.description: Creamy roasted red pepper hummus with crisp carrots, celery, cucumber, and whole wheat pita chips
instructions: Arrange carrot sticks, celery sticks, and cucumber slices on a plate.
Place hummus in a small bowl alongside the vegetables.
Add pita chips on the side for extra crunch.

bal_protein_energy_balls.name: Oat and Date Energy Balls
bal_protein_energy_balls.description: No-bake energy balls made with oats, dates, almond butter, and dark chocolate chips
instructions: Pulse dates in a food processor until they form a sticky paste.
Add oats, almond butter, flaxseed, honey, and salt. Pulse until combined but still slightly chunky.
Fold in chocolate chips by hand.
Roll mixture into 4 balls and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before eating.
Store in the fridge for up to 1 week.

bal_greek_yogurt_parfait.name: Strawberry Granola Parfait
bal_greek_yogurt_parfait.description: Layered Greek yogurt parfait with fresh strawberries, crunchy granola, and a honey drizzle
instructions: Layer half the yogurt in a glass or jar.
Add a layer of sliced strawberries and a tablespoon of granola.
Repeat with remaining yogurt, strawberries, and granola.
Top with chia seeds and a drizzle of honey.

bal_cottage_cheese_fruit.name: Cottage Cheese and Pineapple Bowl
bal_cottage_cheese_fruit.description: Low-fat cottage cheese topped with fresh pineapple chunks, sunflower seeds, and a dash of cinnamon
instructions: Scoop cottage cheese into a bowl.
Top with fresh pineapple chunks and sunflower seeds.
Sprinkle with cinnamon and serve.

bal_edamame_snack.name: Spiced Edamame with Sea Salt
bal_edamame_snack.description: Steamed edamame pods tossed with sea salt, garlic powder, and a hint of chili flakes
instructions: Steam or microwave edamame according to package directions until heated through.
Drain and toss with sea salt, garlic powder, and red pepper flakes.
Serve warm and pop beans out of pods to eat.

bal_banana_nut_muffin.name: Whole Wheat Banana Nut Muffin
bal_banana_nut_muffin.description: A moist whole wheat banana muffin studded with walnuts, served with a smear of cream cheese
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F. Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Mix mashed banana, egg, honey, and melted coconut oil in a bowl.
Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt until just combined. Fold in walnuts.
Pour batter into one muffin cup. Bake 18-22 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.
Let cool slightly and serve with a smear of cream cheese. Recipe makes 1 large muffin.

bal_cheese_crackers.name: Cheese and Whole Grain Crackers
bal_cheese_crackers.description: Sharp cheddar cheese slices with whole grain crackers, grapes, and a few almonds
instructions: Arrange cheddar slices and crackers on a small plate.
Add grapes and almonds alongside.
Enjoy as a balanced snack — pair cheese with crackers and alternate with fruit and nuts.

bal_smoothie_green.name: Green Power Smoothie
bal_smoothie_green.description: Vibrant green smoothie with spinach, banana, protein powder, and almond butter
ingredients: 1 scoop vanilla protein powder (whey or plant-based)
instructions: Add almond milk and spinach to a blender. Blend until smooth.
Add banana, protein powder, almond butter, and ice cubes.
Blend on high for 45-60 seconds until completely smooth and creamy.
Pour into a glass and serve immediately.
